ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "staetfp" INTEGER /* State FIPS code */,
  "countyfp" INTEGER /* County FIPS code */,
  "geoid" INTEGER /* GEOID */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the county */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the county's population */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the county centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the county centroid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "covid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive COVID-19 cases */,
  "negative_cases" INTEGER /* Number of negative COVID-19 cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "rate_per_100000" REAL /* Rate of cases per 100,000 residents */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Rate of hospitalizations per 100,000 residents */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Rate of deaths per 100,000 residents */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the data was reported */,
  "date_last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_covid_data" (
  "state_covid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state COVID-19 data entry */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "positive_cases" INTEGER /* Number of positive COVID-19 cases */,
  "negative_cases" INTEGER /* Number of negative COVID-19 cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "number_tested" INTEGER /* Number of tests administered */,
  "number_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Rate of hospitalizations per 100,000 residents */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Rate of deaths per 100,000 residents */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the data was reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_covid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_shape" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "shape_area" REAL /* Area of the county */,
  "shape_length" REAL /* Length of the county */,
  "centroid_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county centroid */,
  "centroid_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county centroid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_shape_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreaks" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "number_outbreaks" INTEGER /* Number of outbreaks reported */,
  "date_first_outbreak" TEXT /* Date of the first reported outbreak */,
  "date_last_outbreak" TEXT /* Date of the last reported outbreak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreaks_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., administrator, analyst, public health official) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Median age of the county's population
Latitude coordinate of the county centroid
Longitude coordinate of the county centroid
Unique identifier for each COVID-19 data entry
Date the data was last updated
Unique identifier for each state COVID-19 data entry
Unique identifier for each shape entry
Unique identifier for each outbreak entry
